title: Eden Redis Migration (cloned)
description: Real-time monitoring for Redis data migrations. Track progress, throughput, latency, and queue health during live migrations. (cloned)

definition.content:
## Eden Redis Migration

Real-time visibility into Redis data migrations. Monitor key transfer progress, data throughput, operation latencies, and queue health.

**Key Metrics:** Progress % | Keys collected/processed/remaining | SCAN/DUMP/RESTORE latencies | Queue utilization
